svg.font-family: Inter, Segoe UI, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: An MoE decode step reads a different 3B every token
Qwen3-30B-A3B — 8 of 128 experts per layer, 48 layers. The lit set moves on the next token.
One token’s route across the stack
384 expert blocks read this token (8 × 48 layers)
scattered across 128 resident experts; the next token relights a different 384.
reads like a 3B, stores like a 30B
Architecture: Qwen3-30B-A3B model card (Hugging Face). Decode ceilings = 644.6 GB/s R9700 bandwidth ÷ weight bytes read — upper bounds, not measured throughput.
